revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
[[commons:Category:Ishi-jinja (Katsuragi, Nara)]][[ja:為志神社]] {{Expand Japanese|為志神社}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Ishi Shrine | native_name = 為志神社 | image = Ishi-jinja-Katsuragi-02.jpg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Ishi Shrine | coordinates = {{coord|34.48272222222222|135.71997222222222}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Ishi Shrine'''|為志神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022918|ltq=Q135022918|qid=Q135022918|1=Shikinai Successor}} * {{ill|Shikinai Hiteisha|lt=Shikinai Hiteisha|ja|比定社|qid=Q135026601|1=Shikinai Hiteisha}} == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11433427|ltq=Q11433427|qid=Q11433427|1=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q659672|ltq=Q659672|qid=Q659672|1=Katsuragi, Nara}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|34.48272222222222|135.71997222222222}} == image (P18) == * Ishi-jinja-Katsuragi-02.jpg == OpenStreetMap node ID (P11693) == * 12457765254 == architectural style (P149) == * {{ill|Nagare-zukuri|lt=nagare-zukuri|en|Nagare-zukuri|fr|Nagare-zukuri|it|Nagare-zukuri|ja|流造|pl|Nagare-zukuri|ru|Нагарэ-дзукури|sv|Nagare-zukuri|zh|流造|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} == country (P17) == * {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * いしじんじゃ == postal code (P281) == * 639-2131 == Commons category (P373) == * Ishi-jinja (Katsuragi, Nara) == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Q135038961|ltq=Q135038961|qid=Q135038961|1=Ishino Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '奈良県葛城市林堂311', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '311, Hayashidō, Katsuragi-shi, Nara-ken 639-2131', 'language': 'en'} == image of entrance (P9721) == * Ishi-jinja-Katsuragi-01.jpg {{commons category|Category:Ishi-jinja (Katsuragi, Nara)}} [[JA:為志神社]] {{wikidata link|Q38276022}} == Japanese content == {{出典の明記|date=2025年5月}} {{神社 |名称 = Ishi Shrine |画像 = [[File:Ishi-jinja-Katsuragi-01.jpg|260px]]
Torii and worship hall |所在地 = {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Katsuragi|Q659672|qid=Q659672|1=Katsuragi, Nara}} Hayashidō 311 |位置 = {{Coord|34|28|57.8|N|135|43|11.9|E|type:landmark_region:JP-29|display=inline,title|name=為志神社}} |祭神 = Ikobitohei no Mikoto |社格 = {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|lt=Shikinaisha (small)|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}} |創建 = unknown |本殿 = One-bay shrine, {{ill|lt=nagare-zukuri|Q210684|qid=Q210684|1=Nagare-zukuri}} |別名 = |札所等 = |例祭 = |神事 = |地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=為志神社|position=bottom|width=200|float=center|caption=|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=20}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=13|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200}} }} '''Ishi Shrine''' (also written 爲志神社, いしじんじゃ) is a shrine in {{ill|lt=Katsuragi|Q659672|qid=Q659672|1=Katsuragi, Nara}}, {{ill|lt=Nara Prefecture|Q131287|qid=Q131287|1=Nara Prefecture}}. === History === The founding date is unknown. The shrine is listed under {{ill|lt=Yamato Province|Q907495|qid=Q907495|1=Yamato Province}} {{ill|lt=Oshimi District|Q11490759|qid=Q11490759|1=Oshimi district}} in the {{ill|lt=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|Q11064932|qid=Q11064932|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō}}. Following government policy in the Meiji period, it was merged into {{ill|lt=Katsurakiza Hitokotonushi Shrine|Q11620954|qid=Q11620954|1=Katsuraki ni Imasu Honoikaduchi Shrine}} and abolished in 1910 (Meiji 43). A stone monument titled "Ishi Shrine Ruins" was erected, and in 1982 (Shōwa 57) the shrine buildings were reconstructed and the shrine was revived. === Enshrined deity === The enshrined deity is Ikobitohei no Mikoto. === References === *Precinct information board === Notes === {{Reflist}} {{神道 横}} {{Shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Ishi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Ishi Shrine]][[Category:Shikinai Successor]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Nara Prefecture]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]] [[Category:葛城市の歴史]] [[Category:Buildings and structures in Katsuragi, Nara]]
